name: Gaelic Coffee
recipeIngredient: 2 cups hot black coffee (nearly double the amount of whiskey)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add a jigger of whiskey and sugar to taste into your mug.
2. Pour in the hot black coffee, ensuring it's nearly double the amount of whiskey used.
3. Stir well until combined.
4. Top up with double cream using a spoon.
5. Gently heat the spoon and carefully pour the cream over the back of the spoon.
6. Serve immediately.
